title: cyrtochilum refractum
intro: Cyrtochilum refractum, also known as the 'refracted Cyrtochilum' or 'Cyrtochilum refractum orchid', is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyrtochilum refractum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Cyrtochilum refractum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support respiratory health and immune function.
